findings.evidence_context: FlightAware's publicly-published integration-sales contact for AeroAPI onboarding — a documentation pointer telling users where to request API access, not personal PII. Present verbatim in the published main branch README.md and SKILL.md (flight-goat is an existing published CLI; this is a reprint).
